theme: Org-scale fill + gen-batch preview CLI — scale the M45 generation engine from a BOUNDED batch to filling an ENTIRE org from one supporting-population descriptor (auto-fill to org size), per-story; add a gen-batch preview/dry-run CLI that renders the expanded prompts + cached JSON + an estimated-cost line WITHOUT seeding; fence the real LLM dependency behind an explicit --gen-batches opt-in; tune throughput + verify 429 backoff under burst. The four code deliverables were built fixtures-first (TOK-01, iter-02..05), then proven on a REAL ~600-member Azure gpt-4o-mini run (iter-06/07). The CODE-owns-structure / AI-owns-content boundary is N-invariant (every generated role/skill routes through the existing resolvers; non-resolving names drop; closure stays GREEN). Entirely in rosetta-extensions — ZERO platform-repo edits.

gate.target: A full org (e.g. 500) fills from a single supporting-population descriptor with a believable role/avatar/skill spread (not 90% hollow); the demo-coverage SEMANTIC believability gate (coverage-protocol.md, the M42 Playwright harness) PASSES on the generated population; hero-name collisions stay at 0 under population-scale load; throughput + cost stay within the declared budget (~1k members <= a few minutes at --max-concurrent=5).
gate.achieved: A ~500/735-member org fills from ONE supporting-population descriptor (per-story, deterministic auto-fill). The M42 Playwright SEMANTIC sweep is ROBUSTLY MET COLD on BOTH vantages: employee MET at iter-07 (0,0,0,0,0); manager MET at close after the demo-patch/recapture campaign (final cold sweep reachable=69/150, failingSections=0, gateMet=true, personaFailures=0, escapes=0, notReachedPages=0, frontier=EXHAUSTED; /enterprise/activity-dashboard kind=real-content; 0 cms panics across the 13-min sweep; render-verified dan-manager activity table rowCount=20 mainTextLen=2409). 0 hero-collisions on a real ~600-member Azure batch; $0 byte-distinct cache-hit reseed; cost/throughput within budget (ai-lib 429 backoff on-by-default + EU->direct fallback; --max-cost ceiling aborts at breach).

harden_equivalent: INFERRED-SHAPE: iterative — NO formal harden-mstone-iters --final pass. The final-harden was satisfied by the demo-patch / recapture VERIFICATION CAMPAIGN: 4 adversarial sub-agents (B = members-grid authz-skip; DD = Directus column-drift backfill; SG = serve-grant deep-fetch closure recapture; + the gridperf/T1 next-web pagination + FK indexes), EACH running the full stack-seeding + stack-snapshot + demo-stack pytest suites + the M42 manager+employee coverage sweeps, PLUS orchestrator-level verification (a public-only cache audit, render-verify of the dashboard + members grid, and a fresh --purge /demo-up 3 reproducibility proof). This campaign EXCEEDS a standard harden pass; close did NOT demand a separate --final harden.

iter_ledger.tiks: iter-02..iter-07 (6 tiks); budget 3-5 iters. iter-07 raised an exit-3 re-scope-trigger (the manager enterprise grids were a platform-bound render wall at org scale), which the subsequent demo-patch/recapture close SUPERSEDED (decomposed the wall into demo-patchable + recapturable costs and cleared all 3 grids demo-locally) — the re-scope was RESOLVED, not escalated.
iter_ledger.summary: iter-01 tok: authored TOK-01 + the kb-fidelity audit (GREEN). iter-02: deliverable #1 auto-fill count (Batch.Fill/resolveBatchCounts, one descriptor fills a story to its Size, deterministic, cache invariant held). iter-03: deliverable #2 per-story distribution (BatchMember.StoryIndex; each story's members land in ITS org). iter-04: deliverable #3 gen-batch preview/dry-run (renders prompts + cached JSON + estimated cost WITHOUT seeding, no LLM, no key, values-blind). iter-05: deliverable #4 --gen-batches opt-in fence on stackseed (empty/incomplete cache fails LOUD) + 429-backoff verification + exported seeders.ReservedHeroNames. iter-06: the REAL ~614-member Azure gpt-4o-mini gate-proving SURFACED + FIXED 2 org-scale bugs (multi-batch cache-index collision + name-distinctness at scale); 4 of 5 gate faces PASS. iter-07: the 5th gate face — fixed the 998 double-size bug (descriptor-size containment) + seed-time name + email distinctness backstops + the warm-grid harness poll; employee sweep MET, manager sweep failingSections=3 (platform-bound) -> re-scope-trigger. CLOSE campaign (B/DD/SG/T1 demo-patch + recapture): cleared all 3 manager grids cold -> manager gate MET, re-scope superseded.

HONEST REPRODUCIBILITY CAVEATS (recorded in retro.md): (1) `down` needs --purge to pick up a regenerated cache — a plain down/up keeps the volume and no-ops the structure replay (the documented stale-cache re-up behavior); (2) a fresh /demo-up seeds the default STORIES preset (~341); the org-scale enterprise org (735 generated) is a separate /stack-seed --gen-batches. M46 is the FINAL v1.10 milestone -> v1.10 is now FEATURE-COMPLETE on release/01.10-method-acting; the release is NOT merged to main at this close — /developer-kit:close-release (merge release/01.10-method-acting -> main, tag v1.10) is the user's next step, after their visual review.
